chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 772 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.528/2023 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.529/2023 10.12.2025 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for the applicant Ms. Saima Syed, advocate for respondent along with Mr. Naveed Ahmed, advocate Pursuant to order dated 08.10.2025, learned counsel for respondent states that it may be just and proper and in the interest of all parties concerned, to set aside the impugned judgment and remand the matter back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law expeditiously, preferably within 90 days. She further seeks that pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken against the respondent arising here from. Learned counsel for the applicant articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the reference application may be disposed off in the said terms. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969 Judge Judge Amjad
